Streetwear Manufacturer: How to Build Your Brand With Low MOQ Production

✎ FABRIOZA Team 📅 July 1, 2026 ☕ 12 min read
Home / Blog / Streetwear Manufacturer: How to Build Your Brand With Low MOQ Production

Streetwear demands quality that speaks before your brand does. Heavyweight fabrics, precise construction, and finishes that get better with every wash. At FABRIOZA, we manufacture premium streetwear for brands that refuse to compromise — with MOQ starting at 50 pieces and factory-direct pricing from Pakistan.

Streetwear Market 2026

The global streetwear market exceeds $185 billion and continues to grow. Independent brands are capturing market share from established players by offering unique designs, premium quality, and authentic brand stories. The barrier to entry has never been lower — if you have the right manufacturer.

What Makes Streetwear Different

Streetwear is defined by specific construction and finishing details that set it apart from basic apparel:

  • Heavyweight fabrics: 320-400 GSM for hoodies, 220-300 GSM for tees
  • Oversized fits: Dropped shoulders, extended body, relaxed silhouette
  • Premium finishes: Garment-dyed, enzyme-washed, vintage treatments
  • Bold customization: Puff print, cracked effects, 3D embroidery

Products FABRIOZA Manufactures for Streetwear Brands

  • Heavyweight Hoodies: 320-400 GSM, French terry or brushed fleece, oversized fit
  • Oversized T-Shirts: 220-300 GSM, boxy fit, dropped shoulders
  • Jogger Sets: Matching hoodie and jogger combinations
  • Cargo Pants: Utility pockets, premium cotton construction
  • Crop Tops: Women's streetwear, raw hem options

Printing Techniques for Streetwear

  • Puff Print: Raised, textured ink — the streetwear signature
  • Cracked Print: Vintage distressed aesthetic
  • Discharge Printing: Soft-hand prints on dark garments
  • 3D Embroidery: Bold, textured logos

Garment-Dyed and Washed Effects

We offer enzyme washing, garment dyeing, and vintage treatments that give streetwear its lived-in character. These processes are applied after construction, ensuring unique color variations on every piece.

Brand Launch Guide

Start with 2-3 hero products (typically a hoodie and a tee), perfect your samples, photograph on real people, and launch with 50-100 pieces. Use pre-orders to gauge demand before committing to larger quantities.

Why Pakistan for Streetwear

Pakistan's long-staple cotton produces exceptionally soft yet durable fabrics. Labor costs are 30-40% lower than China for comparable quality. The garment-washing expertise in Sialkot is world-class — essential for authentic streetwear finishes.

Build Your Streetwear Brand With FABRIOZA

50 pieces minimum. Heavyweight blanks. Premium construction. Free quote in 24 hours.

Start Your Streetwear Brand →

Frequently Asked Questions

What makes your streetwear different from basic blanks?

Premium long-staple cotton, reinforced construction, and specialty garment-washing techniques create the premium feel retail brands demand.

Can you do oversized/boxy fits?

Yes, oversized and boxy fits are our specialty. We customize patterns to achieve your exact desired silhouette.

Do you offer garment washing?

Yes — enzyme wash, acid wash, vintage wash, and mineral wash are all available.

What is the minimum for streetwear?

50 pieces per style, per color. Mix sizes within the 50-piece minimum.

How do I start my streetwear brand?

Send us your designs or reference garments. We'll create a sample within 7-10 days for your approval.
